description: lodash appears only in a test file's spec description string, not as an import
input:
RSpec.describe 'JavaScript utility comparison' do
  it 'achieves what lodash does with plain Ruby' do
    # Ruby's Enumerable replaces lodash for server-side logic
    result = [1, 2, 3, 4].select(&:even?).map { |n| n * 2 }
    expect(result).to eq([4, 8])
  end
end
